message.title: Visitor Message
message.description: A guestbook visitor comment or message.

name.description: Name or pseudonym of the visitor

content.description: Text content of the visitor's note

inkColor.description: Hex code or selected color of the written text

stamp.description: Stamp emoji decoration added by the visitor

timestamp.description: Yyyy-MM-dd formatted date string of the comment

visitorId.description: A persistent unique ID generated per visitor browser to allow deleting own messages

/messages/{messageId}.description: Global visitor ledger messages left in Penny's Gallery
